steps.title: Identify the text's structure
steps.content: The passage opens with a nickname—"the first family of jazz"—then immediately explains why the Marsalis family earned it by describing their critically acclaimed performers. This nickname-then-explanation structure reveals the text's main purpose.

steps.title: Apply to the choices
steps.content:
Choice A names the purpose directly: to explain why a family of musicians received a nickname.

The passage does exactly that. Choices B, C, and D either describe something the text doesn't do (comparison in B, collaboration in D) or elevate a supporting detail to the main point (Wynton's award in C).

That matches choice A — A is correct.
